name: AI-native ERP: ADK agents, onboarding assessment & website chat — release 1.16.16
body:
This release turns GrowERP into an AI-native ERP, adds a full onboarding/assessment flow, and brings public website chat — on top of a large round of UI, backend, and CI hardening since 1.15.4.

## Highlights

1. **AI-native agents (ADK)** — new `growerp_adk` building block and a standalone agents app: agent governance UI, per-agent chat, multi-agent orchestration (coordinator/specialist teams), and an AI assistant that opens and prefills operational screens from chat directives.
2. **Knowledge & RAG** — knowledge upload, product import, per-company memory, and RAG REST endpoints.
3. **LLM platform** — modular LLM provider configuration with selectable models (Gemini 2.5/3.5), system-wide LLM usage tracking, monthly token limits, and an audit-log dashboard.
4. **MCP integration** — read-only REST access for SystemSupport via MCP, external MCP server support in the Agent Control Center, and a CI Monitor agent.
5. **Onboarding & ERP-need assessment** — post-login business-profiling assessment that auto-tailors the menu, plus a first-login welcome flow.
6. **Website & storefront** — bidirectional public customer-inquiry chat widget; GrowERP/tenant landing pages and assessment landing; per-owner storefront product/category scoping; dynamic ProductStore setup at runtime.
7. **Chat** — `growerp_chat` moved into core; email delivery to offline recipients; WebSocket subscription cleanup/recovery and real-time badge updates.
8. **UI/design refresh** — UserList-style lists with server-side search, standardized `popUp` dialogs, modal `DialogPage` routes, and a mobile-friendly `ListFilterBar`.
9. **Home widgets** — Android and iOS accounting ledger widgets.
10. **Backend** — `Application` entity for app version/URL management, HTTPS submodules with an `--ssh` setup flag, and Moqui submodule bumps (MCP/ADK).
11. **Testing & CI** — mobile + desktop matrix integration tests, search-based (non-index) record retrieval, grouped test-failure reporting, and hardened store-submission workflows.

266 commits since 1.15.4 (66 features, 93 fixes).
